title: Rose Quartz
description: A pack that turns diamonds into rose quartz (basically, diamond items are pink now)
body:
This pack changes all diamond related blocks and items to have a pinkish hue, along with making diamonds themself look like a pink version of quartz (hence, rose quartz)

This pack is part of the [Damienne's Transpacks](https://modrinth.com/collection/iVtcpx87) collection of resource packs. 
![An image showcasing all blocks and items affected by the retexture of Diamonds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6372d84a0b99bcfba866bea8edc571c69b5b55cb.png)
